name: Canonical Design Systems

provenance.label: Apple Human Interface Guidelines
provenance.use: Platform-native interaction, restraint, hierarchy, accessibility, and motion principles.

provenance.label: Material Design
provenance.use: Systematic foundations, interaction states, adaptive UI, tokens, and component behavior.

provenance.label: IBM Carbon Design System
provenance.use: Enterprise-grade component documentation, accessibility, grid, and token discipline.

provenance.label: Shopify Polaris
provenance.use: Product admin clarity, merchant-facing content, components, and experience guidance.

provenance.label: Microsoft Fluent
provenance.use: Cross-platform product interaction, density, motion, and component conventions.

provenance.label: Adobe Spectrum
provenance.use: Creative tooling UI, tokenized foundations, and component anatomy.

provenance.label: Atlassian Design System
provenance.use: Collaboration product patterns, content guidance, and UI foundations.

provenance.label: Design Tokens Community Group
provenance.use: Token interoperability and design token standards.

licenseNotes: Reference public guidelines and APIs. Do not redistribute protected assets. Respect each system's brand and licensing terms.
extractedSignals: Taste is not decoration; it includes platform expectations, accessibility, content, states, and component behavior.
Strong systems document foundations before components.
Premium execution uses repeatable constraints: grid, tokens, density, state coverage, and motion rules.
